mapper.select: SELECT CASE Active WHEN 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS Active FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER WHERE LoginId = #{LOGIN_ID} And Active = 1
SELECT A.LoginId, A.EmployeeNum /*사용자ID*/ FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER A WHERE 1=1 AND EmployeeNum = #{LOGIN_ID} And ISNULL(A.Active,'') != '0' Order by A.Active DESC
